goal: square_fn(cx, t) = mul_fn(c * c, square_fn[T](x), t)
discrete_expectation[T](pmf, mul_fn[T, Real](c * c, square_fn[T](x))) = c * c * discrete_expectation[T](pmf, square_fn[T](x))
discrete_expectation[T](pmf, square_fn[T](cx)) = c * c * discrete_expectation[T](pmf, square_fn[T](x))
discrete_expectation[T](pmf, cx) * discrete_expectation[T](pmf, cx) = c * mu * (c * mu)

proof: function(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real) { x0 * x1 * x2 = x0 * (x1 * x2) }(c, mu, c * mu)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real) { x0 * (x1 * x2) = x1 * (x0 * x2) }(c, mu, mu)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real) { x0 * x1 * x2 = x0 * (x1 * x2) }(c, c, mu * mu)

goal: discrete_expectation[T](pmf, cx) * discrete_expectation[T](pmf, cx) = c * c * (mu * mu)
discrete_variance[T](pmf, cx) = discrete_expectation[T](pmf, square_fn[T](cx)) - discrete_expectation[T](pmf, cx) * discrete_expectation[T](pmf, cx)
discrete_variance[T](pmf, cx) = c * c * discrete_expectation[T](pmf, square_fn[T](x)) - c * c * (mu * mu)
c * c * discrete_expectation[T](pmf, square_fn[T](x)) - c * c * (mu * mu) = c * c * (discrete_expectation[T](pmf, square_fn[T](x)) - mu * mu)
proof: function(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real) { x0 * x1 - x0 * x2 = x0 * (x1 - x2) }(c * c, discrete_expectation[T](pmf, square_fn[T](x)), mu * mu)

goal: discrete_variance[T](pmf, x) = discrete_expectation[T](pmf, square_fn[T](x)) - mu * mu
discrete_variance[T](pmf, cx) = c * c * discrete_variance[T](pmf, x)

proof: function[T0: lib(add_group).AddGroup](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 + -x1 = x0 - x1 }[Real](discrete_expectation[T](pmf, x), c)

goal: add_fn[T, Real](x, const_real_fn[T](c), t) = x(t) + const_real_fn(c, t)
proof: function[T0, T1: lib(add_semigroup).AddSemigroup](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { add_fn[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x2) + x1(x2) }[T, Real](x, const_real_fn[T](c), t)

goal: x(t) + c - (mu_x + c) = x(t) + c + -(mu_x + c)
proof: function[T0: lib(add_group).AddGroup](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 + -x1 = x0 - x1 }[Real](x(t) + c, mu_x + c)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { -x0 + -x1 = -(x0 + x1) }(mu_x, c)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real) { x0 + x1 + x2 = x0 + (x1 + x2) }(x(t), c, -mu_x + -c)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { x0 + x1 = x1 + x0 }(-mu_x, -c)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real) { x0 + x1 + x2 = x0 + (x1 + x2) }(c, -c, -mu_x)
function(x0: Real) { x0 + -x0 = Real.0 }(c)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { x0 - x1 != Real.0 or x0 = x1 }(Real.0 + -mu_x, -mu_x)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { x0 + x1 - x1 = x0 }(Real.0, -mu_x)
function[T0: lib(add_group).AddGroup](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 + -x1 = x0 - x1 }[Real](x(t), mu_x)
function[T0](x0: T0 -> Real, x1: T0, x2: Real) { (x0(x1) - x2) * (x0(x1) - x2) = square_dev[T0](x0, x2, x1) }[T](y, t, mu_y)
function[T0](x0: T0 -> Real, x1: T0, x2: Real) { (x0(x1) - x2) * (x0(x1) - x2) = square_dev[T0](x0, x2, x1) }[T](x, t, mu_x)

goal: square_dev(y, mu_y, t) = square_dev(x, mu_x, t)

proof: function[T0](x0: DiscretePMF[T0], x1: T0 -> Real) { discrete_expectation[T0](x0, square_dev[T0](x1, discrete_expectation[T0](x0, x1))) = discrete_variance[T0](x0, x1) }[T](pmf, y)
function[T0](x0: DiscretePMF[T0], x1: T0 -> Real) { discrete_expectation[T0](x0, square_dev[T0](x1, discrete_expectation[T0](x0, x1))) = discrete_variance[T0](x0, x1) }[T](pmf, x)
